title: AST Felony Eluding, DUI, Refusal, Reckless Driving, Warrant Arrest x2: Cantwell [AK21029035]

summary: On 05/19/21 at 1528 hours, Alaska Wildlife Troopers attempted to make a traffic stop on a southbound grey Honda CR-V for a moving violation near mile 199 of the Parks Highway. title: AST Take Caribou Closed Season: King Cove [AK21048405]
summary: On 5/8/2021, Alaska Wildlife Troopers based In King Salmon responded to King Cove based on an anonymous tip regarding the illegal take of caribou. Investigation revealed that three caribou were taken on 5/5/2021 in GMU 09D within the Izembek NWR Wilderness Area. The season closed on 3/31/2021. Jonathan Severian (49), Graydon Severian (20), Jeremiah Wilson (23), and Howard Christiansen (75), all from King Cove were charged with taking caribou during a closed season and unlawful possession. Additionally, James Gould (73) was charged with unlawful possession. The caribou were seized and donated to charity with the firearms utilized in the offense seized as well. A summons was issued for all counts through the Anchorage Court.
